text: Every morning, I wake up at six o'clock and start my day with a glass of water. After a quick shower, I have a simple breakfast, usually toast and coffee. My work starts at eight, and I spend most of the morning at my desk. I have lunch around noon and try to take a short walk afterward. At five in the evening, I leave work and head to the gym for exercise. I jog for thirty minutes and do some stretching. After dinner, I enjoy reading a book or watching a TV show. I stick to this routine every weekday—it keeps me balanced and productive.
